steps.title: Spot the surprise condition
steps.content: The phrase “even though” signals a paradox: we're looking for a surprising fact that seems to work against the global increase—something that should have pulled copper production down.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
The correct answer shows the United States mined less copper in 2020 (1.20 million metric tons) than in 1995 (1.85 million metric tons)—capturing the paradox that a major producer declined yet global production still rose.

The other choices either misstate the data or describe trends supporting rather than challenging the global increase.

That is the correct answer.
